text.title: AI Agent Patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the task need tools (external data, side effects, code execution)?

conclusion.verdict: CoT on raw SDK. No tools, no loop.

branch.when: needs_tools == true AND needs_planning == true AND team_familiar_langgraph == true
needs_tools == true AND needs_planning == true AND team_familiar_langgraph == false

conclusion.verdict: Plan-and-Execute hand-rolled on raw SDK — avoid an unfamiliar framework.

branch.when: needs_tools == true AND needs_planning == false AND cli_surface == true

conclusion.verdict: Use Claude Code headless — battle-tested, no custom harness needed.

branch.when: needs_tools == true AND needs_planning == false AND cli_surface == false

conclusion.verdict: ReAct on raw SDK. Smallest viable shape.
preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.
